plugins.pyqgis_plugin: Avab värsked ESTHub Satilao WMS kihid koos navigeerimisvõimalusega. Võimaldab QGIS kaardivaate alusel tehtud päringu põhjal sirvida pilvituid kaardilehti. [cite: 1] Lisab eraldi tööriistariba. [cite: 2] 1.2.4 [cite: 2] 3.0 [cite: 1] 4.9 [cite: 1] https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=15TjLrLDa1CxiSKbSowAEWpLyIjjGwYKS Urmo Saar [cite: 2] EstHub_Satiladu_WMS_1.2.4.zip

Projects vector layers onto raw DJI 3E/4T photos and draws the camera FOV on the 2D map. Add pins directly onto photos and display them on 2d map. [cite: 3, 4] Reads DJI XMP EXIF data and uses OpenCV to map 3D vector features onto the 2D image plane, and reverse ray-casts the camera footprint. [cite: 5] 0.9.9 [cite: 5] 3.10 [cite: 3] 4.99 [cite: 3] https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=12mEQnLtHIUhBoW1xGOW03usFHHLc3EwI Urmo Saar [cite: 5] MavicProjector_0.9.9.zip
